properties.Deficiency_Description: An - Boil/Seepage - refer to 2018 DSR, 2023 site visit confirmed sediment remains and measurements are not taking place., An - Signage/Public safety - no contact numbers given, grafitti on spillway inner wall, fence IN spillway to prevent recreation in spillway., An - animal burrows, An - evidence of leakage along spillway , An - vegitation, particularly upstream face and along spillway, Au - Spillway is undersized, ~120cms spillway vs ~ 300cms IDF. unknown if fence in spillway to deter recreational use has "fuseplug"
140m long LLO has significant pitting. ROV conducted in august confirmed max=14mm, min=1mm, majority 3-12mm. There is not an upstream gate or as builts.
